app.title: Knowhy
app.subtitle: AI Email Assistant
app.description: Secure, intelligent email management powered by AI

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to access your AI email assistant

chat.welcomeMessage: I'm your AI email assistant. I can help you read, summarize, and manage your Gmail inbox. What would you like to do?

gmail.connectDescription: Connect your Gmail account to let Knowhy read and manage your emails securely.
gmail.securityNote: Your credentials are stored securely in Auth0 Token Vault. We never store your Google tokens.

settings.title: Settings
settings.securityDescription: All email actions are protected by Auth0 Token Vault. Sensitive operations require MFA.
